scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach((file)=>{ if(fs.existsSync(file)) fs.unlinkSync(file); }); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){ console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.desktop:build: cross-env PORT=4173 BASE_PATH=/ VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3002 pnpm --filter @workspace/helpdesk run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
